auth.label: API Key
auth.description: SecurityTrails API key sent with the APIKEY header. Create or view it on your credentials page: https://securitytrails.com/app/account/credentials

actions.name: find_associated_domains
actions.description: Find domains associated with one hostname in SecurityTrails.

hostname.description: The bare domain or subdomain to query without protocol or path.

page.description: The 1-based results page to fetch from the associated-domain listing.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for associated domains.

hostname.description: The hostname used for the associated-domain lookup.

items.description: One associated-domain record returned by SecurityTrails.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for associated domains.

actions.name: get_domain
actions.description: Get current DNS and domain details for one hostname from SecurityTrails.

hostname.description: The bare domain or subdomain to query without protocol or path.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for current domain details.

domain.description: Raw domain details returned by SecurityTrails.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for current domain details.

actions.name: get_domain_ssl
actions.description: Get SSL certificate details for one hostname from SecurityTrails.

hostname.description: The bare domain or subdomain to query without protocol or path.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for SSL certificate details.

hostname.description: The hostname used for the SSL lookup.

ssl.description: Raw SSL details returned by SecurityTrails.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for SSL certificate details.

actions.name: get_subdomains
actions.description: List known subdomains for one hostname from SecurityTrails.

hostname.description: The bare domain or subdomain to query without protocol or path.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for known subdomains.

hostname.description: The hostname used for the subdomain lookup.

items.description: One subdomain label returned by SecurityTrails.

subdomains.description: Known subdomain labels for the requested hostname.

additionalProperties.description: The number of matching subdomains for this DNS record type.

recordTypeCounts.description: Mapping of DNS record type to the number of matching subdomains.

outputSchema.description: The output payload for known subdomains.
